headline: Marriott (MAR) Launches Ask Bonvoy As It Passes 10,000 Hotels And Buys Lefay
summary: Marriott International (NasdaqGS:MAR) has launched Ask Bonvoy, a beta conversational AI booking tool designed to personalize search and trip planning. The company has surpassed 10,000 properties worldwide, marking a new scale milestone in its global hotel portfolio. Marriott has entered a joint venture to acquire luxury wellness brand Lefay, with plans to integrate it into its broader platform and rewards ecosystem. Marriott International, trading at $396.2, is rolling out these updates...

headline: Marriott International (MAR) Stock After Strong Multi‑Year Rally Are Valuations Still Justified
summary: If you are wondering whether Marriott International's share price still makes sense after a strong run, it makes sense to start with the valuation picture. The stock last closed at US$396.20, with returns of 7.3% over the past month, 26.4% year to date and 53.6% over the past year, although it declined 1.6% over the last week. Recent coverage has focused on Marriott International's position within the broader travel and hospitality sector and on how investors are reacting to shifts in demand...
